criteria.note: tools/axxon_mcp_audit.py exists with AxxonMcpAudit dataclass exposing audit_connect_axxon_profile, list_audit_event_kinds, audit_inject. Direct gRPC via stub_from_proto(AUDIT_PROTO, 'AuditEventInjector') confirmed in source.

AUDIT_KINDS dict defines 6 kinds with correct required fields: camera_viewing/ptz_control->[camera_ap]; archive_viewing->[camera_ap, archive_ap]; journal_export->[start, end]; client_app_option->[group, setting, setting_value]; ldap_setup->[ldap, group, setting, setting_value]. list_audit_event_kinds() returns them without a live call.

audit_inject returns {status:disabled} when enabled=False; returns {status:gap} when confirmation != 'CONFIRM-audit-inject'; only calls wire when both pass. Verified in test run (7 tests OK) and source code.

Unknown kind returns {status:error, message:'unknown audit event kind: ...'} before any wire call. Missing required params return {status:error, message:'missing required param(s): ...'} before wire call. Both verified in test run and source.
python3.12 -m unittest tools.tests.test_axxon_mcp_audit: Ran 7 tests OK. Full suite: Ran 696 tests OK (no failures or errors).

Corpus query shows 6 methods tested-pass (InjectClientAppOptionEvent, InjectArchiveViewingEvent, InjectCameraViewingEvent, InjectNgpJournalExportEvent, InjectPtzControlEvent, InjectLdapSetupEvent) and InjectMMExportEvent=tested-warn-fixture-needed. Restamp dry-run reports 0 changes (no drift). live-verify.txt shows all 6 kinds injected with ALL injected: True.

register_audit_tools function exists in axxon_mcp_server.py registering all 3 tools. create_server has audit param (line 53). --enable-audit arg at line 1103. create_server call passes audit=audit at line 1242. Register sanity check returns ['audit_connect_axxon_profile', 'list_audit_event_kinds', 'audit_inject'].
